messages.content: Give me links and names list that are blocked in China and can’t access to it like youtube.

As an AI language model, I can provide you with some popular websites and services that are known to be blocked or restricted in China. However, please note that this list is not exhaustive and the accessibility of these websites may vary. Additionally, the specific websites that are blocked can change over time.

1. Google (including Google search, Gmail, Google Maps) - http://google.com/
2. YouTube - http://youtube.com/
3. Facebook - http://facebook.com/
4. Twitter - http://twitter.com/
5. Instagram - http://instagram.com/
6. WhatsApp - http://whatsapp.com/
7. Snapchat - http://snapchat.com/
8. Pinterest - http://pinterest.com/
9. Dropbox - http://dropbox.com/
10. Vimeo - http://vimeo.com/

Please be aware that the Chinese government regularly updates its internet censorship policies and the availability of these websites may change. To access these blocked services in China, users often rely on Virtual Private Networks (VPNs) to bypass the restrictions, but it's important to note that using VPNs may also be subject to limitations or legal regulations.

On what site do i check all sites blocked in China?

There isn't a single comprehensive website that provides an up-to-date list of all sites blocked in China. The Chinese government regularly updates its internet censorship policies, and the specific websites that are blocked can change over time. However, you may find resources from organizations and services that monitor internet censorship in China, such as GreatFire.org, Blocked in China, or the website of the Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) for official announcements regarding internet restrictions. Keep in mind that these resources may not cover the entire list of blocked websites, as the censorship landscape is constantly evolving.
